text_block_list.text:
There was a heavy rainstorm this morning. While
the weather's cleared up...

The training grounds aren't in good shape. All
training is canceled for the day.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I didn't expect you to invite me on a walk home,
Shakur. It's a little unusual of you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Doto, take a look at that river over there.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh, the river?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's rushing so f-fast... With all the
rainwater, it's like a whole new river...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The river is the same. It may appear different, but
it's just how it was yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The only thing that's changed... is the amount of
water.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The riverbank still has plenty of capacity, though.
The rainwater might push the river to flow a bit
faster, but it's not going to flood out.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And we know that because of some simple math.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh... Math...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Now, Doto. What would happen if there was more
water than the banks had capacity for?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Uh, um...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm not too sure about this, but it would
probably... overflow?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Change can't occur under the
threshold, but exceed the threshold, and change
is bound to happen.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The water's gonna spill over. Doesn't matter how
much you cry or whine about it.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but if it floods, that'd be horrible for the
residents. Everything would get waterlogged and
soggy.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: We'll need to make the riverbed bigger before—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You can't. It's not that simple.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Making it bigger will just break the river. And
don't think you can just scoop the extra water
out, either.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Base stats can't be easily changed, since they're
what determine everything else.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
All the rivers in the world flow atop a set of
numbers.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And it's not just the rivers—most phenomena
occur according to numbers and continue with
little variation.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh... So, um... in other words...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to get it. Just know that this year,
a lot of racers' stats are gonna come to light.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch. Makes me wanna hurl, although I should be
used to it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So what's your pick? You don't have to take my
word, but if you ignore all the signs and take
things too far...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You'll break. That goes for you, and in all
likelihood... your surroundings.
